security.eyebrow: No need trust — na so dem design am
security.title: Five reasons make you no trust anybody.
security.subtitle: We comot every way we fit use take harm you. Wetin remain na code wey dem publish, lock, and people wey no dey work for us don verify.
security.pillar1Body: Full smart-contract audit on SolidityScan (QuickScan). Public report, line-by-line.
security.pillar2Body: Liquidity don lock on-chain — you fit verify on BscScan.
security.pillar3Body: Contract ownership dem don destroy for chain. Nobody fit change the code.
security.pillar4Body: Source code don publish and verify on BscScan. Read every line.
security.pillar5Body: Find any centralization for di contract, claim di prize. Open to anybody, no NDA.

events.title: Daily Zoom Session
events.subtitle: Our community dey run free Zoom sessions every day. Just waka enter, ask anything, we go help you start. No pitch, no pressure, real gist for your language.
events.sessionType1Detail: Open Zoom for pass 12 languages — English, Hindi, Indonesian, Portuguese, Russian, Turkish, Spanish + more. You fit join anytime.
events.sessionType2Detail: Native speakers dey run the calls for your language. We dey pay dem $100/month — apply at /apply.
events.sessionType3Detail: You new to DeFi? Small group calls go waka you through wallet setup, your first deposit, and how the numbers dey work.
events.liveNow: Live Now · You fit join anytime

promotions.str_2: Inspect di smart contract. If you fit prove say any way dey wey di team fit harm holders, di prize na your own.
promotions.str_7: We dey pay creators per view for TurboLoop content. Reels, explainers, livestreams — anything wey go bring new eyes come di ecosystem. Tiers dey based on verified view counts inside 30 days after post.
promotions.str_11: Lead community Zoom session for your language, every week. We go provide di slide deck, di schedule, and onboarding support. You go bring di energy and your local audience.
promotions.str_13: You suppose be native or fluent for di language wey you dey host
promotions.str_14: Stablecoin payout for di 1st day of every month
promotions.str_17: When you bring new member enter di network and dem make their first deposit, you go get stablecoin bonus — wey di protocol generate by itself, e no dey comot from your referral. Bonus amount dey scale with deposit tier. Check di smart contract for exact values, or ask Local Presenter make e explain am to you.
promotions.str_19: Three real ways to get paid.
promotions.str_20: Six-figure bounty for security researchers, per-view payout for creators, and monthly stipend for community leaders. All na stablecoins dem dey pay.
